content.en:
"Ye Tian, this last round of assessment is to assess combat strength. Golems or some special spirits are generally used to assess combat power, but puppets and spirits are not real cultivators, and they basically have great flaws. Therefore, our Black Wind Mountain Peak Master uses the peak master to conduct the assessment. I will use the strength of Issei Physis, the power of Issei True Ancestor, and the power of Issei Soul to fight against you, and I will not use the means of Dao Technique above the power level of Dao Ancestor. But even so, I was able to play a lot of strength. You don't need to beat me, you just need to hold on for an hour to pass the test!"

Lord Long Li Feng said.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded, feeling that this was fair.

After all, he is assessing the assessment of the peak master, and the peak master of Longli is also a peak master, if the peak master of Longli suppresses his strength, he will not be able to hold out for an hour, then it will be too weak.

Besides, he is not an ordinary True Ancestor, even if the Dragon Power Peak Lord goes all out, it is not certain who wins or who loses!

"Be careful!"

Lord Long Li Peak reminded.

In the next moment, countless scales appeared on his entire skin, like ancient dragon scales.

Instantly, he threw a punch.

Rumble!!!!

The void shattered, and the terrifying rules of the fist turned into a huge fist to tear through the space.

"This is my Dragon God Fist, it is a top-grade Origin Divine Power, it has almost reached the limit of the top-grade Origin Divine Power, specializing in breaking defenses, be careful!"

The transmission of the Lord of Longli Peak has arrived.

"Blood River True Body!"

Ye Tian used this Origin Divine Power.

After his refinement, the defensive divine power of the Blood River True Body has also been perfected to the extreme of the top-grade origin divine power, and the power is very powerful.

In addition, his body has been tempered by the power of the Dark Forbidden Body, although it cannot reach the level of the Forbidden Body, the strength of his physical body is far beyond that of other new True Ancestors, and even many top True Ancestors are not as good as Ye Tian.

Ye Tian didn't fight back, but tried to see if his defense could withstand the Dragon God Fist of the Dragon Power Peak Lord.

Rumble!

The collision began!

Under the punch, Ye Tian was knocked out, but he quickly stabilized his body and did not suffer any injuries.

"What a domineering punch!"

Ye Tian exclaimed.

He knew that he had underestimated the Dragon Power Peak Lord, and although the Dragon Power Peak Lord's cultivation was only in the late stage of the Great Dao, his attack power was too powerful, even more powerful than some of the top True Ancestors he had imagined.

"How can it be so powerful, the Dragon Power Peak Lord is only the peak master, and he is not a general, if the peak master is so powerful, then wouldn't the combat power of those generals easily kill some Heavenly Dao Ancestors one by one?"

Ye Tian wondered.

And the Dragon Power Peak Lord was also very surprised, he didn't expect Ye Tian to block his Dragon God Fist without damage.

"He is worthy of being a genius valued by the Wind King!"

Long Li Peak Lord said darkly.

Next, Ye Tian used all kinds of origin supernatural powers to fight with the Lord of Longli Peak, but without using Dao techniques, Ye Tian couldn't help the Lord of Longli Peak at all, and the Lord of Longli Peak couldn't help Ye Tian.

Soon, an hour was about to pass.

Suddenly.

Ye Tian reminded: "Lord Longli Peak, I'm going to perform the Dao technique, be careful!"

After speaking.

Ye Tian used the Sky Splitting Technique, and the terrifying Dao Technique could make the expression of the Dragon Power Peak Lord change.

Immediately, the Dragon Power Peak Lord also performed a Dao Technique-Royal Gold Cover!

The huge golden shield protected itself, but the power of the Sky Splitting Technique still tore through the golden cover, but after tearing the Golden Cover, the power of the Sky Splitting Technique also dissipated.

"Extreme level Dao technique, you are very good!" Long Lifeng said, "I performed the Dao technique just now, which is considered to be a violation of my own rules. You've passed the test, and you've passed it perfectly!"

"The strength of the Dragon Power Peak Lord is also very strong!" Ye Tian praised.

"Are you mocking me?"

The Dragon Power Peak Lord smiled bitterly.

He had also assessed many Preparatory Peak Masters before, but this was the first time he had been forced to perform the Passage Technique.

In the past, there were also many preparatory peak masters who knew Dao techniques, but the power of Dao techniques was related to themselves, Ye Tian's own strength was too strong, and he used extreme level Dao techniques, if he didn't use Dao skills to defend, I am afraid that he would be directly hit hard.

Once it is hit hard, it is a great shame.

Therefore, he could only use Dao Technique Defense.

"No, I really think that the Dragon Power Peak Lord is very strong, the Dragon Power Peak Lord has limited his strength, if he doesn't limit his strength, I'm afraid that his combat power is already comparable to the top level of True Ancestor, such strength should be qualified to become a general, right?" Ye Tian said curiously.

"General?" The Dragon Power Peak Lord laughed and said, "Ye Tian, you probably have a misunderstanding of our Black Wind Mountain General, my strength is not the first after the Peak Lord, how can I become the Black Wind Mountain General?" As for your doubts, I can tell you that this is a misunderstanding caused by the different systems of the two realms. The True Ancestors of your realm are relatively weak, and even the top-level True Ancestors are only mid-to-upper-grade True Ancestors in our realm. "

When Ye Tian heard this, he suddenly realized.

He had fallen into a misunderstanding before, the Dragon Power Peak Lord was the true ancestor of the Divine Heaven Realm, and any genius in the Divine Heaven Realm could be called a demon in their Dao Mountain Realm!

"Let me tell you about the division of the True Ancestor's strength in our Divine Heaven Realm, of course, this is only a private division, and it is not recognized, just know it yourself!"

"I have learned about your realm, you divide the top level of the True Ancestor into three grades, the first grade can kill the weaker One Heavenly Dao Ancestor, the second grade can barely compete with the First Heavenly Dao Ancestor, and the third grade is far beyond the other Dao Ancestors, that is, the top True Ancestor in the general population!"

"In terms of strength, I can be comparable to the second-grade True Ancestor of your realm, and I can barely compete with the weaker First Heavenly Dao Ancestor. Of course, this criterion is based on the First Heavenly Dao Ancestor of your realm as an example, in our Divine Heaven Realm, my strength cannot compete with the weaker One Heavenly Dao Ancestor. "

For example, the One-Tier Heavenly Dao Ancestor of your realm is too weak, many of them are formed with the help of the Ancestral Monument, and the potential is too low, and it is difficult for him to become a Dual Heavenly Dao Ancestor in his lifetime, unless there is a great opportunity. Many of the One-Tier Heavenly Dao Ancestors in your realm are called pseudo-Dao Ancestors in our Divine Heaven Realm, and they are not considered to be true One-Tier Heavenly Dao Ancestors!"

"The strength of the True Ancestors of the Divine Heaven Realm can be divided into five grades according to the standards of our Divine Heaven Realm, ordinary True Ancestors, Elite True Ancestors, Top True Ancestors, Supreme True Ancestors, and Invincible True Ancestors, but this standard is not recognized by some big forces, and they are absolutely not worthy of the title of Supreme and Invincible, so our True Ancestors only use these five criteria to evaluate other True Ancestors in private! In terms of combat power, I am the top True Ancestor, but it is not the top True Ancestor standard in your mouth. In my opinion, there are very few True Ancestors in your realm who can reach the top True Ancestor level!"

Subsequently, the Lord of Longli Peak gave a detailed account of the specific combat power of the five standards.

At this time, Ye Tiancai understood the division of True Ancestor's strength.

Invincible True Ancestor!

These two levels are relatively rare even in the Divine Heaven Realm, the Supreme True Ancestor can compete with the Pseudo-True Ancestor, and the top Supreme True Ancestor can kill the Pseudo-True Ancestor, and compete with the True Ancestor's one-fold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, that is, the first-grade True Ancestor of the Dao Mountain Realm.

The invincible True Ancestor is terrifying, and he can easily kill the First Heavenly Dao Ancestor, and he can compete with the Second Heavenly Dao Ancestor.

In the Divine Heaven Realm, true ancestors who can reach the level of invincible true ancestors have great potential in the future, and they have the hope of becoming invincible Dao ancestors.

Every one of the generals of Black Wind Mountain is a Supreme True Ancestor, and the Blood Demon General is an invincible True Ancestor.

Ye Tian said that the Lord of Longli Peak could become a general, this was undoubtedly a joke, after all, without the strength of the Supreme True Ancestor, where could he be qualified to become a general!

"According to the division of strength, I am now considered the weakest top True Ancestor, not as good as the Dragon Power Peak Lord!" Ye Tian said darkly.

But after all, he had only just been promoted to True Ancestor, and he could quickly improve some of his strength in a short period of time.

What's more, he can also use the power of the dark taboo, coupled with the forbidden attribute contained in the power of the true ancestor, if it all explodes, before the power of the dark taboo is exhausted, I am afraid that he will be able to fight with the dragon power peak master who is going all out without falling behind.

The assessment was over, and the Longli Peak Lord gave Ye Tian all the peak master's equipment, and also took Ye Tian into a certain space in the small realm of the Wind King to replace the peak master's order, and improved his authority.

"Ye Tian, I know you don't know much about Black Wind Mountain, let me tell you about the situation in Black Wind Mountain!"

The Lord of Long Li Peak said solemnly.

"Okay!" Ye Tian showed interest and happily responded.
